case_title: LEARN IT INC. VS. BRITTANY PILGRAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REPORTS THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS BEEN MAKING REGULAR PAYMENTS OF $50.. A MONTH. THE REMAINIGN BALANCE IS $1500.00. PLAINTIFF LEARN IT INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NICOLE PELKY, ACCOUNTING MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRITTANY PILGRAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEARN IT INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE MARCH HEARING FOR AN UPDATE AS TO THE STATUS OF THIS CASE. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE MARCH 12, 2019 HEARING, MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - BRITTANY PILGRAM; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-22-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PURSUANT TO THE AUG-25-16 ORDER IF NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY AT THE FEB-23-17 HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED TO A FUTURE DATE IN AUGUST 2017 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO APPEAR TO REPORT THE STATUS OF THE CASE. NO APPEARANCE BY LEARN IT INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRITTANY PILGRAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-13-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRITTANY PILGRAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2016. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JUNEL SOLBACH, HR MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PER PLAINTIFF, THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT. MATTER CONTINUED, BY REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF, FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-25-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, PROGRESS REPORT CONTINUED FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS. JUDGE: DONALD S. REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 03/14/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEARN IT INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-23-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES REACHED AN ACCORD AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 5/17/16. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LEARN IT, INC. OR DEFENDANT BRITTANY PILGRAM. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT SHALL CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR ANOTHER SIX MONTHS TO AUGUST, 2017 FOR FUTHER PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
